title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rivigo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rivigo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
